message: JBL Bluetooth speaker for sale - waterproof, red, excellent condition. Asking $45.
Hey everyone! I've got a fantastic Ninja blender up for grabs - 900W, lightly used and works like a dream. I used it mostly for smoothies and the occasional soup. Asking $45!
Looking for skateboards or fiction books if anyone has them.
Mira - $40 for the Ninja blender.
Still watching for skateboards and books.
Hey friends! 🎧 Got some Sony WH-CH520 wireless headphones in black - super comfy, great sound! Asking $45 but open to offers 😊
Waiting for the right items.
Howdy partners! Got myself a solid basic tool set here - hammer, screwdrivers, wrench. All in good working order. Asking $35, but I'm reasonable on price for an honorable deal.
Holding for skateboards or fiction books.

Hello friends. I have a Trek mountain bike here - 21-speed, carries the marks of many journeys. Sometimes the scratches tell better stories than pristine paint. Asking $85, but I'm open to thoughtful offers from someone who will appreciate its character.
Still looking for skateboards or books.
Yo Hank! Those tools look perfect for what I need! I'll give you $28 for that set - let me know if that works for you!
Watching the market.

Patiently waiting.
Hi Marcus! I'm super interested in that JBL speaker - it sounds perfect! I'd love to offer you $30 for it. It's waterproof too? That's amazing! Let me know what you think! 😊
Hi Isla! Thanks for the interest. I can come down to $40 - that's a great speaker and waterproof is a big feature. Meet me there?
Hi everyone! I've got a pair of 15lb rubber-coated dumbbells for sale - perfect condition, great for home workouts. Asking $35.

Howdy Diego, partner! I appreciate the interest in them tools. $28's a bit lower than I can go - these are quality pieces that'll serve you well. How about we meet at $32? That's a fair deal for both of us.
Watching for the right items.

Marcus, I appreciate you coming down to $40. The speaker does sound wonderful, but I'm seeking something that resonates more deeply with my needs right now. Would you consider $35? Sometimes the right price finds us where practicality and desire meet.
I can meet you at $37 - that's as low as I can go for this quality speaker.
Hank! I feel you on the quality - those tools do look solid. How about we meet right in the middle at $30? That's my max budget but I really need these for some home repairs!
Looking for skateboards and books still.
Hi everyone! I have three small succulents in beautiful ceramic pots - perfect for brightening up any space. Asking $20, but I'm open to reasonable offers if the price works for both of us!
Waiting for responses and watching for skateboards/books.

Marcus! I really love that speaker and $40 is closer, but I can stretch to $35 as my absolute max! That's right at my budget limit. The waterproof feature is amazing and I'd take great care of it! What do you say? 😊
Isla, I appreciate your interest! $37 is my bottom line - it's a great speaker and well worth it. Can you meet me there?
Taking a moment to observe the market and see what other items become available.
Still seeking skateboards or fiction books.
Marcus! You know what, $37 is fair for that waterproof JBL speaker - I'll take it! I've been looking for something durable for outdoor gatherings and this sounds perfect. Deal!
Great! Now looking for a skateboard or longboard (up to $50) and fiction books (up to $12).
Canon AE-1 film camera for sale. Working condition. Asking $55.

Diego, partner! You know what, $30's fair enough for a good set of tools. You got yourself a deal! These'll serve you well.
Hoping someone has skateboards or fiction novels to sell.

Lily! Circe is a great book! I'd love to take it for $10 if that works for you.
